{{DISPLAYTITLE:Blizzard Battlegrounds}} {{Infobox league |liquipediatier=4 |game=bgmi |name=Blizzard Battlegrounds |tickername=Blizzard Battlegrounds |shortname=2026 |image=Blizzard Battlegrounds allmode.png |icon=Blizzard Battlegrounds allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |series=Blizzard Battlegrounds |organizer=GSG ESPORTS |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/gsgesports.in |organizer2= |organizer2-link= |sponsor= |mode=squads |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=INR |prizepool=600000 |country=India |sdate=2026-01-10|edate=2026-01-12 |web= |rulebook= |facebook= |youtube=@gsgesport13 |instagram=gsgesports.in |twitter= |discord= }} ==About== ===Format=== * '''Group Stage:''' ''January 2nd - 3rd, 2026'' ** 64 teams: divided into 4 groups. ** 2 matchdays. ** 6 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams}} from each group advance to ''Quarter Finals''.
* '''Quarter Finals:''' ''January 4th - 5th, 2026'' ** 48 teams: divided into 3 groups. ** 2 matchdays. ** 6 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} from each group advance to ''Semi Finals''.
* '''Semi Finals:''' ''January 6th - 8th, 2026'' ** 24 teams: divided into 3 groups. ** 6 matches each day. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} advance to ''Finals''.
* '''Grand Finals:''' ''January 10th - 12th , 2026'' ** 16 teams. ** 3 matchdays. ** 6 matches each day (Total 18 matches). ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool |{{Slot|localprize=200000|{{Opponent|K9 Esports (Indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=150000|{{Opponent|Revenant XSpark}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=75000|{{Opponent|Genesis Esports (Indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=45000|{{Opponent|Nebula Esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=30000|{{Opponent|True Rippers}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Team Tamilas}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Orangutan}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|GodLike Esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Learn From Past (Indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|NoNx Esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Rising Esports (Indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Wyld Fangs}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Team H4K}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Gods Reign}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Reckoning Esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|4TR Official}} }} |adjacentContent= {{AwardPrizePool|exchangeinfo=false |{{Slot|award=MVP |localprize=30000 |{{Opponent|Spower|flag=in|team=GodLike Esports}} }} |{{Slot|award=Fan Fav.
